content.speakerText: Should I bring anything? Like snacks or drinks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要带点什么吗？比如零食或饮料？

options.text: I don't know, maybe bring a book.
Nah, I got food covered — just bring your vibe!
You should bring your ID and passport.
It doesn't matter, I'll decide later.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Nah, I got food covered — just bring your vibe!' 是标准回应，明确拒绝了携带食物的需求，同时用轻松语气鼓励对方带心情来。其他选项要么无关（如带护照），要么模糊（如 'I'll decide later'），不符合场景要求的明确或轻松回应。

content.speakerText: I'll bring a six-pack of IPA then!
content.speakerTextCn: 那我带六瓶印度淡色艾尔啤酒来！

options.text: Oh, I'm not a drinker, so please don't.
Yes! That’s perfect — I love IPA!
Why IPA? Can't you bring soda?
Sure, just don't drink too much.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yes! That’s perfect — I love IPA!' 是积极回应并增强互动的典型方式，符合使用说明。其他选项或否定对方提议（如 'don't bring'），或显得挑剔（如 'Why IPA?'），或过于限制（如 'don't drink too much'），不符合友好、热情的社交语境。

content.speakerText: Do you need me to bring anything for the picnic?
content.speakerTextCn: 野餐需要我带点什么吗？

options.text: Bring a blanket and some fruit if you want.
I don't care what you bring, just come.
You must bring a knife and fork.
I'll send you a list later.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Bring a blanket and some fruit if you want.' 是礼貌且具体的建议，既给出选项又不强求，符合场景要求。选项B语气生硬，选项C过于强制，选项D拖延决策，均不符合轻松明确的社交回应标准。

content.template: Should I bring ___? Like snacks or drinks?
content.hint: 询问是否需要携带物品时的通用提问方式
content.knowledgePoint: 疑问句中 anything 的使用（否定/疑问语境）

content.template: Nah, I got food ___ — just bring your vibe!
content.hint: 表示‘已经准备好’的地道表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配 'get something covered'（口语中表示‘安排妥当’）

content.template: Sweet, I'll grab some chips to go ___ it.
content.hint: 搭配食物与饮品的常用介词
content.knowledgePoint: 介词搭配 'go with'（表示‘搭配、相配’）

content.speakerText: Should I bring anything? Like snacks or drinks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要带点什么吗？比如零食或饮料？
expectedAnswers: Nah, I got drinks and snacks covered — just come as you are!
Actually, a bottle of sparkling water would be great!
Anything’s fine, thanks for asking — I’ve got everything ready.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应是否需要携带物品（拒绝/建议/开放）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'bring', 'snacks', 'drinks', 'covered'
语气是否自然、礼貌、符合轻松社交语境

content.speakerText: I'll bring a six-pack of IPA then!
content.speakerTextCn: 那我带六瓶印度淡色艾尔啤酒来！
expectedAnswers: Yes! That’s perfect — I love IPA! I’ll grab some pretzels too!
Sweet, I’ll chill it for you and make some popcorn!
Cool, see you there! Can’t wait to try it!
evaluationCriteria: 是否积极回应并表达欢迎或兴奋情绪
是否顺势补充细节以增强互动（如 'I’ll grab...'）
是否使用口语化表达（如 'Sweet', 'Cool', 'Can’t wait'）

content.speakerText: We’re having a potluck this weekend — do you want to bring something?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们这周末搞个百家宴，你愿意带��什么来吗？
expectedAnswers: I can bring a dessert — maybe chocolate brownies?
Sure! I’ll bring my famous pasta salad.
Thanks for inviting me — I’ll bring a bottle of wine to share.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应愿意或不愿意携带物品
是否提出具体物品（体现准备和参与感）
是否使用礼貌表达（如 'thanks for inviting'）和自然口语
